title: 1.1: Tests that handle_mail_account dispatches attachments from unseen messages for consumption when configured with a mark-as-read action rule
1.2: Tests that messages are marked as read after processing with a mark-as-read action rule
1.3: Tests that messages are not removed from the mailbox when using a mark-as-read action rule
1.4: Tests that handle_mail_account dispatches attachments from messages matching a subject filter when configured with a delete action rule
1.5: Tests that matching messages are removed from the mailbox after processing with a delete action rule
1.6: Tests that the flag action rule only processes unflagged messages matching the filter criteria
1.7: Tests that processed messages are flagged after mail account processing with a flag action rule
1.8: Tests that the total mailbox message count remains unchanged after flag action processing
1.9: Tests that handle_mail_account dispatches attachments from messages matching a subject filter when configured with a move action rule
1.10: Tests that matching messages are moved to the designated target folder after processing with a move action rule
1.11: Tests that a subject filter correctly restricts which messages are processed by the mail rule
1.12: Tests that a body content filter correctly restricts which messages are processed by the mail rule
1.13: Tests that a sender address filter correctly restricts which messages are processed by the mail rule
1.14: Tests that combining multiple filter criteria narrows the set of processed messages
2.1: Places the test for mark-as-read mail account processing in paperless_mail/tests/ directory
2.2: Places the test for delete mail account processing in paperless_mail/tests/ directory
2.3: Places the test for flag mail account processing in paperless_mail/tests/ directory
2.4: Places the test for move mail account processing in paperless_mail/tests/ directory
2.5: Places the test for mail rule filter criteria in paperless_mail/tests/ directory
3.1: All tests use Django's TestCase framework
3.2: All tests follow the test_<name> naming pattern
3.3: All tests use assertEqual or similar standard assertion methods
4.1: All tests use a mocked or simulated mailbox rather than connecting to a real IMAP server
4.2: All tests mock the async task dispatching to verify attachment consumption without triggering real document processing
